zh.Wethersfield, Essex, England: 英國艾可維瑟斯費爾德
zh.Waltham Abbey, Essex, England: 英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比
zh.Great Wakering, Essex, England: 英國艾可格亞特 瓦可林
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Neville於1213年之前出生在英國艾可維瑟斯費爾德時，他的父親Hugh de Neville43歲，母親Joan de Cornhill32歲。他於1230年與Hawise Courtenay在英國戴文奧可哈普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1246年6月8日在英國，埋葬在英國艾可沃爾坦 艾比。

zh-hans.Wethersfield, Essex, England: 英国艾可維瑟斯費爾德
zh-hans.Waltham Abbey, Essex, England: 英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比
zh-hans.Great Wakering, Essex, England: 英国艾可格亞特 瓦可林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Neville于1213年之前出生在英国艾可維瑟斯費爾德时，他的父亲Hugh de Neville43岁，母亲Joan de Cornhill32岁。他于1230年与Hawise Courtenay在英国戴文奧可哈普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1246年6月8日在英国，埋葬在英国艾可沃爾坦 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevils

variants.name: Novel

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Neville was born before 1213, in Wethersfield, Essex, England, his father, Hugh de Neville, was 43 and his mother, Joan de Cornhill, was 32. He married Hawise Courtenay in 1230, in Okehampton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 8 June 1246, in England, and was buried in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Neville est né avant 1213, à Wethersfield, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Neville, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan de Cornhill, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Courtenay en 1230, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 8 juin 1246, à Angleterre, et a été enterré à Waltham Abbey, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Neville vor 1213 in Wethersfield, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Neville 43 und seine Mutter Joan de Cornhill 32. Er hat 1230 in Okehampton, Devon, England Hawise Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 8. Juni 1246 in England und wurde in Waltham Abbey, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Neville è nato il prima del 1213 nel Wethersfield, Essex, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Neville, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Cornhill, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Hawise Courtenay nel 1230, nel Okehampton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 8 giugno 1246, nel England, e fu sepolto a Waltham Abbey, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Nevilleが1213年以前にイギリスエセックスウエスエルスフィールドで生まれた時，父Hugh de Nevilleは43歳，母Joan de Cornhillは32歳であった。1230年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンでHawise Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1246年6月8日にイギリスで死去し，イギリスエセックスワルサム アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Neville(이)가 1213년 이전 영국 에세스 w더스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Neville(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Cornhill(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1230년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 Hawise Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1246년 6월 8일 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 월섬 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Neville nasceu antes 1213, em Wethersfield, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Neville, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Cornhill, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Courtenay em 1230, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 8 de junho de 1246, em Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Neville родился перед 1213 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Neville было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Cornhill, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Courtenay в 1230 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 8 июня 1246 г. в местности Англия и был похоронен в местности валтам эбби, эссекс, Англия.

sm.before 1213–about 8 June 1246: a'e le'I oo le 1213–e tusa o le 8 Iuni 1246

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Neville nació antes de 1213, en Wethersfield, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Neville, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Joan de Cornhill, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Hawise Courtenay en 1230, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 8 de junio de 1246, en Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Waltham Abbey, Essex, Inglaterra.
